title: Void-Attack
body:
# Void-Attack (Version A)
<hr>

Void-Attack is a Modpack inspired by the German "Craft-Attack" Originally from multiple People, including rewinside, SparkOfPhoenix, earliboy, Zander and multiple more!

The Idea of this Modpack and also Craft-Attack is, having a good Survival Multiplayer experience, with Quality of Life Mods to improve the Vanilla experience, but without changing Minecraft too much with Mods with too much Content, no Mods which add new Content in a way to non Vanilla way.

All Credits of the Idea, go to them!

<hr>

## Two Versions

There are two Versions of this Modpack!
Version A and B.

These Versions are mainly the same, just with/without a single Mod.
This Mod is [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons/versions).

The Reason for this is simple, it can be used but can also be a Bottleneck for older Systems, in terms of Performance.

If you want to use it, feel free, it just keeps unloaded Chunks loaded in a good way (LOD) Level of Details are used, to make them seem loaded in the Distance, but they dont really use that much Performance.

For those who have Performance Issues, i recommend using the Version without it.

Version A: **With** [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons/versions)

Version B: **Without** [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons/versions)

**This Modpack is Version A**

You can find Version B [here](https://modrinth.com/modpack/void-attack-b)

<hr>
